description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The structure is composed of two main stories, with the upper level slightly offset and cantilevered over the lower level, creating a dynamic profile. The front facade includes a central entryway flanked by two dark-framed windows and a pair of green patches that may represent landscaping or entry mats. The rear of the house displays large, light-filled windows and a broad, open terrace or patio area. The sides of the house are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a monolithic appearance. The flat roof and use of geometric forms suggest a contemporary urban style suited for dense neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, and a cantilevered upper level. Features include large windows, a central entryway, and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two dark-framed windows, and green landscaping patches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered upper story and the solid, windowless wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and a broad terrace or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wall and minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, flanked by dark-framed windows and minimal landscaping
